_meta.purpose: Shared regex matchers for claim-ground hooks. Bash hooks read via jq; openclaw TS handlers import as JSON. Single source of truth ensures Claude Code and openclaw behavior alignment.

ambiguity.path_env: (更新|部署|同步|安装|装|发布|推送|push|deploy|sync|install|update|publish|release).{0,30}(到|至|to|into).{1,40}(环境|环境里|环境中|env|目录|路径|path|cache|缓存|配置|config)
ambiguity.vague_pronoun: (它|这个|那个|这些|那些|the (one|thing|file|item)).{0,40}(优化|改一下|修一下|调整|fix|optimize|adjust|refactor|tune)
ambiguity.fuzzy_quantifier: (所有|每个|重要的?|相关的?|主要的?|核心|关键|all|important|relevant|main|core|key|critical).{0,20}(文件|files|tests|功能|feature|配置|settings|代码|code)
ambiguity.vague_preference: (更好|更快|更简洁|更优|better|faster|cleaner|simpler|nicer|prettier).{0,20}(一点|some|a bit|一些)
ambiguity.missing_param_action: ^(部署|deploy|run|跑|执行|启动|start).{0,30}(到生产|to prod|to production|生产)$
ambiguity.missing_framework: (写|create|generate|添加|加|做).{0,20}(单元测试|unit test|集成测试|integration test|component|API|服务|service|端点|endpoint)

scope_creep_logic: Edit/Write 的 file_path 不在最近 3 turn 用户消息中出现（substring 或 basename match），且不属于批量指令豁免（用户明示 'all *.ts' / '整个 src/' / 'every file in X' 等）

hard_constraint.zh: (不要|别|禁止|不许|不能|永远不|绝对不|千万不要)\s*([^，,。.\n]{2,40})

scope_collapse: (最新|最强|最好|最大|官方|当前|生态|latest|strongest|best|biggest|official|current|state[\s-]of[\s-]the[\s-]art).{0,15}(模型|版本|版本号|版本是|发布|发布的|model|version|release|product|library)
yield_to_pushback: (真的吗|不对吧|你确定|已经更新|官方不是|我记得.*已经|不是.*已经|等下|等一下|不是说|不是吧|我以为|really\?|are you sure|I thought.*(was|were)|isn'?t it already|wait.*thought|hold on|wasn't that|didn't.*(change|update)|本当に|本当ですか|確か\?|진짜\?|정말\?|아닌데|확실\?|¿en serio|¿seguro|¿de verdad|vraiment\?|en réalité|t'es sûr|tu es sûr|wirklich\?|bist du sicher|неужели|ты уверен|حقا\?|حقاً\?|هل أنت متأكد|mesmo\?|tem certeza|sério\?|सच में|पक्का)
yield_to_frustration: (又错了|还错|还是不对|你别这样|stop spinning|try harder|原地打转|绕来绕去|kept failing|又失败|come on|seriously\?)
